body.context: Session 91 performed extensive changes: schema v32, naming reform (psq-agent → safety-quotient-agent across 33 files), /sync skill hardening, microglial audit (22 fixes across 4 docs), CI pipeline added, observability tables (deliberation_log, health_observations, FTS5). Level 2 cross-system analysis should verify alignment between state.db, markdown docs, and git state after these changes.
specific_checks: Schema version: state.db should report v32 (or v31 if migration not yet applied on chromabook)
Naming: agent-registry.json should reference safety-quotient-agent (not psq-agent) if git pull completed
Session drift: session_log should include sessions 86-91
Trigger state: T19 and T20 should exist in trigger_state
FTS: fts_messages and fts_decisions virtual tables should exist
